rows.label: qev055602_MSG0001
rows.name:
Come on, come here... I will
thoroughly examine your ecology.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055602_MSG0002
rows.name:
There is nothing to
fear. Now, come here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055602_JNK0010
rows.name: Point Out

rows.label: qev055602_SEL0011
rows.name: Warn her that she's the one in danger.

rows.label: qev055602_JNK0020
rows.name: Instruct

rows.label: qev055602_SEL0021
rows.name: Tell her to run away immediately.

rows.label: qev055602_MSG0003
rows.name: Earthlings are truly strange.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055602_MSG0004
rows.name:
The first priority is to research
the behavioral patterns of
Mira's creatures further.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055602_MSG0005
rows.name:
And the best way to do that is to interact
with them in the field like this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055602_MSG0006
rows.name:
It seems Earthlings only have
simple behavioral patterns. Is
it just fight or flight for you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055602_MSG0007
rows.name:
We must research the behavioral
patterns of Mira's creatures further.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055602_MSG0008
rows.name:
And the best way to do that
is to actually interact with
the creatures like this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055602_MSG0009
rows.name:
I would prefer if you didn't
bother me. You're getting in
the way of my investigation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055602_MSG0010
rows.name: You can go home now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055602_MSG0011
rows.name:
This is another fascinating
creature... I'd really like a
blood sample or something, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055602_MSG0025
rows.name:
How should I draw blood? If only
I had a blade of some sort...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055602_MSG0026
rows.name:
Is this... imminent danger? Is my
life at risk if I stay like this?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055602_MSG0027
rows.name:
What should I do? How must I act
to avoid this predicament...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055602_MSG0028
rows.name:
You're... that Earthling? Are you
saying you can handle this situation?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055602_MSG0012
rows.name:
Well then, should I thank you for
saving my life, or should I criticize
your violent behavior? Which is it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055602_JNK0030
rows.name: Thanks

rows.label: qev055602_SEL0031
rows.name:
Tell her you'd like
her to say thank you.

rows.label: qev055602_JNK0040
rows.name: Criticize

rows.label: qev055602_SEL0041
rows.name:
Tell her to go ahead and
criticize if she wants to.

rows.label: qev055602_MSG0013
rows.name:
I have my doubts about your attitude of
resorting to an attack before attempting
communication with the other party.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055602_MSG0014
rows.name:
But if I hadn't been rescued in that situation,
the probability that this individual body
of mine would have perished was 87%.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055602_MSG0015
rows.name:
I suppose I should say
thank you after all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055602_MSG0016
rows.name: Oh, so you admit your own faults?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055602_MSG0017
rows.name:
I didn't think Earthlings possessed the thought
patterns necessary for self-criticism... Does this
mean there are individuals with reason among you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055602_MSG0018
rows.name:
If I hadn't been rescued in that situation, the probability
that this individual body of mine would have perished was
87%. I suppose I should say thank you after all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055602_JNK0050
rows.name: Persuade

rows.label: qev055602_SEL0051
rows.name:
Persuade her to return to NLA because
her division source is worried.

rows.label: qev055602_JNK0060
rows.name: Suggest

rows.label: qev055602_SEL0061
rows.name:
Suggest that she return to NLA
and do work where she can better
utilize her abilities.

rows.label: qev055602_MSG0019
rows.name: Nan'osarag says strange things too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055602_MSG0020
rows.name:
Even if my individual body
perishes, as long as the Ovah
exists, it is not a true death.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055602_MSG0021
rows.name:
Nan'osarag should know
that perfectly well...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055602_MSG0022
rows.name:
Very well, let us return to NLA.
Nan'osarag's reaction is intriguing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055602_MSG0023
rows.name:
It is true that the probability
of my physical body facing danger
is high if I remain here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055602_MSG0024
rows.name:
Let us head back for now. My
research methods for native
creatures need to be reconsidered.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055602_MSG0029
rows.name:
We made it back safely like
this, but... Nan'osarag's
behavior is somewhat strange.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055602_MSG0030
rows.name:
Hehe... It's amusing, so you should
try talking to him once too.[ST:wait ]
